final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical exploded-view diagram of a Sony A7 camera with all components labeled.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view diagram aesthetic — exact rendering style is yours
Composition: must be an exploded view showing all components separated along axes with clear spatial relationships
Subject: must include all internal and external components of a Sony A7 camera with their names labeled
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean technical illustration atmosphere — exact lighting setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a technical diagram surface treatment — exact material finishes are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all component names in Spanish: sensor, montura E, obturador, estabilizador de imagen, procesador de imagen, pantalla LCD, visor electrónico, batería, tarjeta de memoria, dial de modo, botón de disparo, zapata de flash, conectores, y demás piezas internas y externas
Constraints: must preserve accurate Sony A7 camera anatomy, all components must be clearly separated in exploded view, all labels must point to correct parts
Avoid: must avoid clutter that obscures component visibility, must avoid incorrect or generic camera parts not found in Sony A7
